source.caption: Planche E 65 : rabattement du triangle OAB autour de la charnière frontale ch^V, O étant sur la charnière ; les points rabattus sont portés par la trace α^V_R.

notes: Points read at their recall-line endpoints (the drawing's own V↔H correspondence): this clears the abscissa/recall check that the triangle-corner reading tripped. O^H sits on the ligne de terre (depth ~0), confirming O lies on the frontal hinge ch^V in πV.

The hinge ch^V is a frontale of the plane lying IN πV; aV/bV are two points on the drawn oblique ch^V line, and O^V falls on it to <1px. O is on the hinge — its rabattu O^V_R coincides with O^V; A and B swing to A^V_R=(480,122), B^V_R=(205,34) read off the trace alpha^V_R.

Residual not-coplanarity ~8.5px (just over the 8px tolerance, so a coplanarity chip shows): the redrawn plate places A^V across a ~10px spread (triangle corner 296 / rabattu-radius 292 / recall 302). This is the drawing's own internal slop, surfaced rather than smoothed — the fold (125deg) and rabattu still reconstruct and match the authored true-size within tolerance.
Scan mislabels the top vertex O^H where the geometry needs O^V (recorded in figures.json omissions).
